1.text: Choose the statement that best describes the photograph.

choices.A: The farmer is sowing some crops in the field.
choices.B: The sewing machine is being used.
choices.C: The woman is cutting something with scissors.
choices.D: The clothes are being stitched by the woman.

2.text: Choose the statement that best describes the photograph.

choices.A: Vehicles are being parked by the attendants.
choices.B: Several cars are waiting for the light to change.
choices.C: Cars have been parked along the side of the road.
choices.D: Some cars are being set down beside the road.

3.text: Choose the statement that best describes the photograph.

choices.A: People are holding glasses in their hands.
choices.B: They are eating toast at the dinner table.
choices.C: Diners are helping themselves to the buffet.
choices.D: Some people are whining about the meal.

4.text: Choose the statement that best describes the photograph.

choices.A: Boxes are being loaded onto delivery vans.
choices.B: Many of the items are being boxed up by employees.
choices.C: Workers are moving the crates from place to place.
choices.D: Packages have been stacked on top of one another.

5.text: Choose the statement that best describes the photograph.

choices.A: The customer is receiving change from the employee.
choices.B: The cashier is handing some bags to the customer.
choices.C: Shoppers are browsing through the items in the store.
choices.D: The items have all been placed in a single bag.

6.text: Choose the statement that best describes the photograph.

choices.A: Rocks are being moved by construction workers.
choices.B: The performers are all moving in concert.
choices.C: People are gathered in front of a stage.
choices.D: An orchestra is performing for an audience.

7.text: Who is interested in working overtime this weekend?

choices.A: It won't go over well with them.
choices.B: I don't mind coming in on Saturday.
choices.C: Jason's meeting his friends on the weekend.

8.text: It appears as though there's heavy traffic on this road.

choices.A: The item is heavier than I thought.
choices.B: We'd better take a detour then.
choices.C: I rode on the rollercoaster there.

9.text: Could you please mail this letter sometime before noon?

choices.A: She wrote that she's doing well.
choices.C: I'll take care of it right now.

12.text: What seems to be the problem with the new intern?

20.text: Will the package be delivered by the end of the day?

choices.A: That's what the courier told me.
choices.B: You can go ahead and sign for it.
choices.C: Yes, let's have a pizza delivered.
